title: Super-Resolution GANs Path
description: Build fluency in Super-Resolution GANs inside Generative Models by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: ESRGAN
steps.summary: ESRGAN belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Super-Resolution GANs. It sits inside Generative Models / Super-Resolution GANs. Compare it with Real-ESRGAN and GFP-GAN. It opens into Real-ESRGAN.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Real-ESRGAN
steps.summary: Real-ESRGAN belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Super-Resolution GANs. It sits inside Generative Models / Super-Resolution GANs. Start after ESRGAN.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: GFP-GAN
steps.summary: GFP-GAN belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Super-Resolution GANs. It sits inside Generative Models / Super-Resolution GANs. Compare it with Real-ESRGAN and ESRGAN.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
